source_catalog.coverage_summary: 82-page official manual covering SoColor Pre-Bonded (Blended, Extra Coverage, DreamAge, Reflect, Ultra Blonde, HD, SoRed, SoBoost, SoColor 10 min), SoColor Sync Pre-Bonded, Tonal Control, SoColor Cult, Coil Color and lighteners. Full palette charts, mixing ratios, developers, processing times, gray-coverage and lift rules, tone decoding, FAQs.
notes: Verified %PDF-1.7 header; 5.68 MB; 82 pages; text extracted with pypdf.
Primary source for both canonical keys.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Same manual as above; SoColor Sync section (demi-permanent pp.~90-122) includes alkaline toner palettes, fast toners, HD series, Clear, decoding, gray-blending tables and FAQs.

source_catalog.source_title: Matrix SoColor Pre-Bonded Permanent Cream Hair Color | Matrix Professional (product page)
source_catalog.coverage_summary: Marketing copy (Pre-Bonded/Pre-Blended/Pre-Paired) and 'How to use' mixing/timing boilerplate (Standard 30-45 min; High Impact Brunettes 1:1.5, 35 min; Ultra.Blonde 1:2, 50 min; Reflect Collection Metallics 1:1 with 20/30 vol, 35 min). Shade swatch list is JavaScript-rendered and not extractable.
notes: Mentions sub-collections (High Impact Brunettes, Reflect Collection Metallics) absent from the 2023 manual - logged as a source conflict.

issue_log: Manual found via site search ('matrix haircolor manual 2023 pdf site:matrix.com'); downloaded with curl, %PDF header verified, text extracted with pypdf (82 pages).
All shade-level records derive from the 2023 manual; product pages contributed only line-level usage boilerplate.
